REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (201 Central Avenue, Capitola, California)
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

Ms. Rasch stated that she has the declaration requested by the examiner and provided an endorsed filed copy to the Court. The Court reviewed the document and stated that there are no issues and that the sale will proceed. The sale for improved real property was confirmed at $755,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 10/24/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $700,000.00 is required.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
